kirundi.scatter_for_relationships_line_for_tim: Ubwiyunge ku isano, umurongo ku gihe, inkingi ku vyiciro, histogram ku miterere y'ikwirakwizwa, box plot ku gukwirakwira + ibidasanzwe, ogive ku vyegeranye. Gutoranya ubwoko bubi bw'imbonerahamwe akenshi vyayovya kuruta gutanga amakuru.
kirundi.ap_stats_data_literacy_items_each_ques: Ibintu vya AP Stats / ubumenyi bw'amakuru. Buri kibazo gihuza n'amakuru akora kugira ngo ushobore kugenzura mu maso mbere yo gusubiza.
kirundi.paste_from_google_sheets_generate_samp: Komeka uvuye muri Google Sheets, kora amakuru y'icitegererezo, ohereza nka PNG/CSV. Abanyeshure benshi bagereranya make ukuntu isesengura ry'amakuru nyaryo ari ISUKURA ry'amakuru (~70% vy'igihe cose).
kirundi.set_a_true_population_r_then_watch_how: Shiraho r nyayo y'abaturage, hanyuma urabe uko ingano y'icitegererezo, urusaku, n'ibidasanzwe bigoreka r yagaragaye. Nta manota, nta guhishura — kora inyifatizo unarondere.
kirundi.x_coordinate_for_new_data_point: Ihuriro X ku ngingo nshasha y'amakuru
kirundi.y_coordinate_for_new_data_point: Ihuriro Y ku ngingo nshasha y'amakuru
kirundi.sample_size_interpret_r_with_n_in_mind: Ingano y'icitegererezo — sigura R² wibuka n
kirundi.select_a_quiz_type_and_click_start_qui: Toranya ubwoko bw'ikizamini hanyuma ufyonde "Tangura Ikizamini"!
kirundi.watch_how_statistics_change_as_each_po: Raba uko sitatisitiki ihinduka uko buri ngingo igaragazwa imwe ku yindi.
kirundi.observed_r_is_off_by_0_05_0_15_expecte: r yagaragaye ikaba 0.05-0.15. Biteganyijwe ku n nto canke urusaku ruringaniye.
kirundi.observed_r_differs_by_0_15_0_30_a_real: r yagaragaye itandukanye na 0.15-0.30. Ingaruka nyayo ishobora kugaragara nke (canke ibinyuranye).
kirundi.observed_r_is_wildly_off_0_30_outliers: r yagaragaye ikaba cane (>0.30). Ibidasanzwe canke n nto cane bishobora guhindura icerekezo kigaragara burundu.
kirundi.set_true_population_r_sample_size_nois: Shiraho r nyayo y'abaturage, ingano y'icitegererezo, urusaku, ibidasanzwe. Hanura uko r yagaragaye ikaba. Nta manota, nta guhishura.
kirundi.your_hypothesis_which_single_change_mo: Inyifatizo yawe (ni iyihe mpinduka imwe igoreka cane r yagaragaye?)
kirundi.e_g_2_outliers_at_n_20_do_more_damage_: urug., ibidasanzwe 2 kuri n=20 bitera ivyangiritse vyinshi kuruta ibidasanzwe 10 kuri n=200...
kirundi.can_outliers_flip_the_sign_of_r_try_tr: Ese ibidasanzwe bishobora guhindura ikimenyetso ca r? Gerageza r nyayo=+0.7 hamwe n'ibidasanzwe 3.
kirundi.when_does_noise_sd_swamp_the_true_sign: Ni ryari SD y'urusaku irengera burundu ikimenyetso nyaco - r isa ite ico gihe?
kirundi.i_can_explain_why_this_combination_of_: Nshobora gusigura impamvu uyu mvange wa n, urusaku, n'ibidasanzwe utera iri tandukaniro.
kirundi.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Igikoresho c'ubushakashatsi - nta manota, nta guhishura, nta gusuka ibisubizo. Amakuru asanzwe akoresha imbuto ihamye iva mu duceri, bityo umwanya umwe w'akaceri buri gihe usubiramo isasagura imwe. Ubushakashatsi nyabwo bubona isasagura imwe kandi bugomba kwiyumvira ku kutamenya neza.
